purpose: File-level guide for the WEEX real contract analysis skill.

scripts/weex_analysis_prepare.py.role: Replay payload preparation CLI for large normalized datasets before analysis.
when: symbol or account-scope filtering before replay review

scripts/weex_analysis_cli.py.role: Primary analysis CLI for snapshot, fill, replay, profile, order-risk, and account-risk review; order/account-risk routes delegate to the vendored shared core.

scripts/weex_risk_review_core.py.role: Vendored copy of the shared order/account risk review core used by both installable WEEX skills.
when: verifying the analysis skill stays aligned with the trader skill

references/snapshot-schema.md.role: Accepted normalized JSON shapes for snapshot, fill, replay, profile, order-risk, and account-risk analysis.

references/analysis-playbook.md.role: Checklist for interpreting exposure, collateral, replay, profile, order-risk, and account-risk results.

SKILL.md.role: Behavioral routing and safety policy for the analysis skill.
